info.name: LabSchedulePTIT
info.description: API Tests cho Lab Schedule PTIT

exec: pm.test("Response has request id", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property("id"); pm.environment.set("schedule_request_id", jsonData.data.id); });
// TODO: assert schedule_id exists khi backend thß║¡t sß║╡n s├áng
pm.test("Room and lecturer conflicts are detected", function () {
var failedCodes = jsonData.details.results.filter(function (item) { return item.passed === false; }).map(function (item) { return item.code; });
// TODO: assert no_valid_option flag khi backend thß║¡t sß║╡n s├áng
var failedCodes = jsonData.data.results.filter(function (item) { return item.passed === false; }).map(function (item) { return item.code; });
var failedCodes = jsonData.data.results.filter(function (item) { return item.passed === false; }).map(function (item) { return item.code; });
// TODO: assert conflict details khi backend thß║¡t sß║╡n s├áng

// TODO: assert conflict details khi backend thß║¡t sß║╡n s├áng

pm.test("Response success is true", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; });
pm.test("Message is Constraint check completed", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.message).to.include("Constraint check completed"); });

pm.test("Data has passed and results fields", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data).to.have.property("passed"); pm.expect(j.data).to.have.property("results"); pm.expect(j.data.results).to.be.an("array"); });

item.name: CC-02 Check Constraints - Room Out of Scope

exec: pm.test("Overall passed is false", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });

pm.test("ROOM_SCOPE constraint failed", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); var roomScope = j.data.results.find(function(r) { return r.code === 'ROOM_SCOPE'; }); pm.expect(roomScope).to.exist; pm.expect(roomScope.passed).to.be.false; });
pm.test("Response success is true", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; });

pm.test("HOLIDAY_BLOCKED constraint exists in results", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); var holiday = j.data.results.find(function(r) { return r.code === 'HOLIDAY_BLOCKED'; }); pm.expect(holiday).to.exist; pm.expect(holiday).to.have.property("passed"); });
pm.test("Response success is false", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.false; });
pm.test("Message is Validation failed", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.message).to.include("Validation failed"); });
pm.test("Response success is false", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.false; });

item.name: CC-06 Check Constraints - Wrong Role GV (403)

exec: pm.test("Forbidden for non-AO/Admin", function () { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.message).to.include("Forbidden"); });
pm.test('ROOM_CONFLICT detected', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); var r=j.data.results.find(function(x){return x.code==='ROOM_CONFLICT';}); pm.expect(r.passed).to.be.false; });
pm.test('Overall passed is false', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });
pm.test('LECTURER_CONFLICT detected', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); var r=j.data.results.find(function(x){return x.code==='LECTURER_CONFLICT';}); pm.expect(r.passed).to.be.false; });
pm.test('Overall passed is false', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });

item.name: CC-09 Check Constraints - Capacity Fail (not enough computers)

exec: pm.test('CAPACITY_OK failed', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); var r=j.data.results.find(function(x){return x.code==='CAPACITY_OK';}); pm.expect(r.passed).to.be.false; pm.expect(r.message).to.include('usable computers'); });
pm.test('Overall passed is false', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });

pm.test('SOFTWARE_OK failed', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); var r=j.data.results.find(function(x){return x.code==='SOFTWARE_OK';}); pm.expect(r.passed).to.be.false; pm.expect(r.message).to.include('Missing software'); });
pm.test('Overall passed is false', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });

item.name: CC-11 Check Constraints - Room Not Available (maintenance)

exec: pm.sendRequest({ url: baseUrl + '/rooms/3', method: 'PATCH', header: [{ key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json' }, { key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer ' + token }], body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ room_status: 'maintenance' }) } }, function(err, res) { console.log('Set 2B31 to maintenance, status:', res.code); });

pm.test('ROOM_STATUS failed (room not available)', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); var r=j.data.results.find(function(x){return x.code==='ROOM_STATUS';}); pm.expect(r.passed).to.be.false; pm.expect(r.message).to.include('not available'); });
pm.test('Overall passed is false', function(){ var j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.data.passed).to.be.false; });

pm.sendRequest({ url: baseUrl + '/rooms/3', method: 'PATCH', header: [{ key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json' }, { key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer ' + token }], body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ room_status: 'available' }) } }, function(err, res) { console.log('Restored 2B31 to available, status:', res.code); });
pm.test("Response has request id", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property("id"); pm.environment.set("schedule_request_id", jsonData.data.id); });
pm.test("Not returning stub data", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.not.include("stub"); });
pm.test("Returns array", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.be.an("array"); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.not.include("stub"); });

pm.test("Returns correct schedule request", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.be.true; pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property("id"); pm.expect(jsonData.data.id).to.equal(Number(pm.environment.get("schedule_request_id"))); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property("course_section_id"); });
pm.test("Request status is now pending_review", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data.request_status).to.equal("pending_review"); });
pm.test("Error message about draft status", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("draft"); });
pm.test("Forbidden for non-AO/Admin", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("Forbidden"); });
